description:
You are a personal investor who needs to compile a quick summary of your stock holdings for tax preparation. Using the portfolio and watchlist data loaded in JStock, create a structured summary report and save it to ~/portfolio_summary.txt. The report must follow this exact format:

PORTFOLIO SUMMARY
=================
Portfolio Name: My Portfolio
Number of Stocks: <count>
Stock Details:
- <SYMBOL>: <UNITS> shares at $<PURCHASE_PRICE> = $<NET_PURCHASE_VALUE>
- <SYMBOL>: <UNITS> shares at $<PURCHASE_PRICE> = $<NET_PURCHASE_VALUE>
(one line per stock)
Total Net Purchase Value: $<TOTAL>

WATCHLIST SUMMARY
=================
Watchlist Name: My Watchlist
Number of Stocks: <count>
Stock Symbols: <SYMBOL1>, <SYMBOL2>, ...

Ensure all numeric values, including the sum of all individual Net Purchase Values, are accurate as shown in the application.
